template_data.headline_html: How a lapsed registration nearly cost everything.

image_headline: SAM EXPIRED. CONTRACT ON THE LINE.
image_prompt: Split-panel before/after infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'BEFORE' with red warning icon. Three short labels stacked: 'SAM LAPSED', 'PAYMENT FROZEN', 'RECOMPETE LOST'. Right panel white/cream, bold label 'AFTER' with green checkmarks. Three short labels stacked: 'SAM ACTIVE', 'PAYMENT RELEASED', 'CONTRACT SAVED'. Center divider with illustrated professional in blazer walking from dark to light side. Bold headline top: 'SAM EXPIRED. CONTRACT ON THE LINE.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
